commands.name: env
commands.description: Commands which interact with the current environment.

commands.name: require
commands.description: Require that the environment contains all required variables.

commands.name: display
commands.description: Display values of current project CI environment variables.

commands.name: exec
commands.description: Execute a command in a containerized execution environment.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize project. Creates suggested CICEE files.

commands.name: repository
commands.description: Initialize project repository. Creates suggested CICEE files and continuous integration scripts. Optionally includes CICEE CI library.

commands.name: lib
commands.description: Gets the path of the CICEE shell script library. Intended to be used as the target of 'source', i.e., 'source "$(cicee lib --shell bash)"'.

commands.name: exec
commands.description: Execute a command within a shell which has the CICEE CI shell library (<path>) and is initialized for the project environment.

commands.name: meta
commands.description: Commands interacting with project metadata.

commands.name: cienvironment
commands.description: Commands related to the project's CI environment.

commands.name: variables
commands.description: Commands related to the project's CI environment variables.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds a new project CI environment variable.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Removes a project CI environment variable.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Modifies an existing project CI environment variable.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists the project's CI environment variables.

commands.name: version
commands.description: Gets version in project metadata.

commands.name: bump
commands.description: Increments version in project metadata.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets version in project metadata.

commands.name: template
commands.description: Commands working with project continuous integration templates.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize project CI scripts.

commands.name: lib
commands.description: Initialize project CI with CICEE execution library. Supports 'cicee exec'-like behavior without CICEE installation.
